title: Content Intelligence Foundation Remaining Roadmap

summary.immediate_next_stage_title: Visual / Data / Infographic Requirement Schema Closure

corrected_remaining_path.title: Visual / Data / Infographic Requirement Schema Closure
corrected_remaining_path.purpose: Create the dedicated schema and governance closure for visual intelligence requirements across future long-form Featured Reads.
corrected_remaining_path.blocked_scope: visual generation, article mutation, CSS/JS mutation, publishing

corrected_remaining_path.title: Reference and Source Credibility Schema Closure
corrected_remaining_path.purpose: Define candidate-source, approved-source, rejected-source, verification-status and link-health governance before source discovery or insertion.
corrected_remaining_path.blocked_scope: web fetching by script, reference insertion, article mutation, public publishing

corrected_remaining_path.title: JSONL-first Content Intelligence Store Governance
corrected_remaining_path.purpose: Define durable JSONL-first storage conventions for content packets, source candidates, visual plans, quality reviews and learning snapshots.
corrected_remaining_path.blocked_scope: content generation, public mutation, backend activation, Supabase activation

corrected_remaining_path.title: Publish Queue and Approval State Register
corrected_remaining_path.purpose: Define draft, review, approved, publish-ready, published and rejected states before any production article upgrade.
corrected_remaining_path.blocked_scope: publishing, article mutation, reference insertion, backend activation

corrected_remaining_path.title: Content Intelligence Foundation Closure
corrected_remaining_path.purpose: Close AG06 foundation after AG06I-AG06L are validated.

corrected_remaining_path.title: Long-Form Article Generator / Visual Agent / Quality Scorer / Semi-Auto Queue
corrected_remaining_path.purpose: Begin production-tooling work only after AG06Z closure and explicit user approval.
corrected_remaining_path.blocked_scope: automatic public publishing until separately approved

stage_gate_rules: AG06I through AG06L must remain governance/schema/registry-only unless separately approved.
AG06Z must close the foundation before AG07 production-tooling work begins.
No article rewrite generation may begin before AG07 and explicit approval.
No public article mutation may occur before a later approved public upgrade patch.
No reference URL insertion or change may occur until reference/source credibility schema is closed and a later approved insertion patch exists.
No scaffold copy, move, delete or import may occur without explicit approval.
No backend, Auth, Supabase, subscriber or dynamic public output activation may occur in AG06.
